title: mariscus meyenianus
intro: Mariscus meyenianus, also known as Bolivian lemongrass, is a species of plant in the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from headaches and sore muscles. Bolivian lemongrass can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
